scripts.format: npm run format:api && npm run format:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:web: npm --prefix apps/web run test:unit && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.install:all: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e 'apps/api[dev]' && npm install && npm --prefix apps/web install
